title: Reserialize rejects a missing paths parameter

steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. Optional, automated-covered error path: confirm the pre-flight validation rejects a missing/empty/null `paths` before any mutation. The missing-parameter branch is asserted by the automated tests below; no fs setup is needed.

steps.title: Expected outcomes
items: mutation.success is false / absent (no mutation happened)
error message mentions 'paths' and that whole-project reserialize is not supported

steps.title: Paste the agent output (raw error envelope)
